claim: No Stable, release, complete conformance, package-parity, or publication claim is made.

semantics.nativeBasis: A labelled native text input owns a conditional listbox through the editable combobox pattern.
semantics.rolePolicy: The baseline owns combobox/listbox/option and consumer-controlled busy/retry state; match context is absent when disabled.

keyboard.behavior: Moves the active suggestion without moving DOM focus.
Moves to the first or last enabled suggestion while open.
Closes suggestions without changing the value.

nonColor: Text, check state, structure, and explicit labels accompany color.
responsive: Logical properties and bounded overlays support narrow and RTL layouts; manual evidence remains incomplete.
consumerResponsibilities: Provide localized visible labels and messages.
Keep option ids unique and retest assistive technology after composition.
Own remote transport, cancellation, cache, and pagination state; the component only renders supplied state and invokes supplied callbacks.
Do not claim Stable until all promotion evidence is current.
